market_context: GEOPOLITICAL SHOCK, CONTAINED: the US struck 80+ Iranian sites Jul 7 and revoked Iran's oil-sale waiver — Brent +3.3% to ~$76.5, 10Y yields at 4.56% after SEVEN straight up-days, VIX +14% to 18.4. But SPY held the 742 line (747.7, +0.2%) and the 'obvious' war trades did NOT confirm (XLE -0.6%, SHLD flat) — so per the posture rule this is a contained scare, NOT active risk-off. The yield squeeze, not the strikes, is what broke the high-beta names: RIVN and HLIT stopped out (-1,940 CZK realized combined; both stops did their job). The NBIS 185 dip-limit filled on the flush — a planned buy executing at the planned price. Account ~70% invested + NVO tranche-2 zone live; CPI Tue Jul 14 gates the rest of the redeployment.

position_actions.action: EXECUTE tranche 2 — buy ~3,400 CZK in the 48.5-49.5 zone (now 48.54)
position_actions.reason: The pre-planned 40% second tranche zone is live. No company-specific news — NVO fell with yields and the tape, which is exactly the dip the tranche was designed for. Planned in advance = framework-legal add. Stop stays 46.5 (-4.2% from here); catalysts unchanged (Medicare GLP-1 coverage, oral Wegovy, earnings Aug 6).

position_actions.action: NBIS filled at 185 — set the plan: stop 174, sells 205 (40%) / 225
position_actions.reason: Your dip-limit executed on the Iran/yields flush (now 186.98, +45 CZK). Place the stop at 174 promptly — a filled position without a live stop order is the one state the framework never allows. Combined AI-infra exposure with CRWV is ~10% of account — fine. The 230 reclaim remains the momentum-confirmation level.

position_actions.action: HOLD — but it is 5.6% above the stop; if 6.85 fires, re-entry is a 7.70 reclaim
position_actions.reason: 7.26 (-461 CZK), the book's weakest. The Iran strikes did NOT lift defense (SHLD flat) — no rescue bid coming from headlines. Cyberhawk Q3 close is still the catalyst, the stop is still the risk manager. Pre-committed re-entry per posture rule: reclaim of 7.70 with two consecutive green closes.

position_actions.action: Trim limit 0.6 @ 345 is live — if unfilled by Friday's close, trim half at market
position_actions.reason: 335.56 (+66 CZK). Six days to the Jul 14 double binary (Q2 earnings + June CPI, with yields already rising seven days straight). The framework's size-down rule has a deadline: Friday Jul 11 close. Stop 319.5 covers the rest.

position_actions.action: HOLD — sell limit 0.42 @ 318 live, exactly per plan
position_actions.reason: 309.44 (+106 CZK), weathered the shock well. After 318 prints, raise the stop on the remainder to 302 (entry lock). Earnings Jul 30.

position_actions.action: HOLD — the fortress position; sell1 190 unchanged
position_actions.reason: 180.13 (+421 CZK), barely dented by the shock — the value-semi thesis keeps absorbing hits (MU +2.6% today too; the chip bounce resumed even through Iran headlines). Stop 171 live, 40% off at 190, runner plan above 205. Earnings Jul 29.

position_actions.action: HOLD — do NOT add on war headlines; tranche 2 only at 532-538
position_actions.reason: 540.09 (-43 CZK). Counter-intuitive but honest: defense barely moved on the strikes — the war premium is already priced. Chasing LMT on Iran news a day late has no edge; the Jul 21 earnings print (guidance already raised) is the real catalyst. The pre-planned 532-538 tranche zone stands.

position_actions.action: HOLD — the 85 breakout was rejected; trigger resets, stops unchanged
position_actions.reason: 81.02 (-50 CZK). Monday's touch of 85 failed on the shock — a rejected breakout is information, not a sell signal; the stop at 61.5 and the 65 tranche (3.5k reserved) manage the risk. New confirmation: daily close above 85.

position_actions.action: STOPPED OUT at 16.40 (-1,109 CZK) — re-entry trigger defined, no revenge trade
position_actions.reason: The stop did its job: -12% instead of riding a yield-squeeze lower (now 16.49). The delivery-beat thesis wasn't wrong, the timing was. Re-entry per posture rule: daily close back above 17.80 (the old entry-zone floor) before Jul 25, else wait for the Jul 30 earnings reaction and re-run the framework on the print.

position_actions.action: STOPPED OUT at 12.83 (-870 CZK) — re-entry only on a 14.00 reclaim before Jul 24
position_actions.reason: The pre-earnings drift never came and the stop fired through the 12.90 level on the gap (now 13.43). The idle-rule deadline (Jul 20) was already looming — the market just enforced it early. Re-entry: reclaim of 14.00 on volume before Jul 24 revives the drift play into the Jul 27 print; otherwise skip the binary entirely.

watchlist.note: ~15k CZK stays in reserve until June CPI (Tue Jul 14, 14:30 Prague). Yields up 7 straight days + hot May print (4.2%) = the one number that decides the next leg
watchlist.trigger: CPI cool + SPY holds 742 -> redeploy into the strongest trigger below. CPI hot -> stops are live, do nothing, reassess Wednesday

watchlist.note: Fell to 110 — the 124 reclaim trigger is now ~12% away; the dip-zone entry (120-125) broke. Play dormant, NOT dead — earnings Jul 23
watchlist.trigger: Only a daily close back above 124 revives it; below that there is no setup, just a falling knife

watchlist.note: Friend Dizu's pick; lorundrostat PDUFA Dec 22 — the pre-PDUFA drift entry window opens ~early November
watchlist.trigger: Early Nov, clean technical setup, hard stop mandatory

watchlist.note: Honesty log: the Iran 'obvious trades' did not confirm (XLE -0.6%, SHLD flat on strike day) — day-late geopolitical chases stay forbidden
watchlist.trigger: Only a multi-day confirmed trend in energy/defense with a dated catalyst would qualify
